message:
style: reformat MCP, collection, install, and configuration modules

Apply consistent Rust formatting across remaining codebase:

MCP (mod, protocol, resources, server, tools):
- Function call and struct init formatting
- Import reordering

Collection (gpu, incremental, mod):
- Metric collection formatting improvements

Install, signature, verify, shadow:
- CLI output formatting alignment
- Signature verification function formatting

Agent init, audit writer, daemon metrics, logging layer:
- Configuration and initialization formatting

Output, plan modules:
- Output formatting and plan module consistency

Common/config (policy, preset):
- Policy struct and preset formatting alignment

No functional changes — formatting consistency only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
